subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Possessor of my spirit and Beloved of my heart! I beseech Thee by the fragrance of Thy tresses and the sweet perfumes of Thy garment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و مالک روحی و محبوب فوادی اسئلک بعرف غدائرک و تضوعات قمیصک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement
